title: Add hpke + x25519-dalek deps to nie-core Cargo.toml
description:
What: Add hpke 0.12 and x25519-dalek 2 crates to nie-core so sealed sender can use HPKE seal/open and X25519 key ops.

Algorithm:
1. Read /home/mark/WORK/nie/Cargo.toml (workspace manifest)
2. Add to [workspace.dependencies] section:
   hpke = { version = "0.12", features = ["alloc", "x25519"] }
   x25519-dalek = { version = "2", features = ["static_secrets"] }
3. Read /home/mark/WORK/nie/core/Cargo.toml
4. Add to [dependencies]:
   hpke = { workspace = true }
   x25519-dalek = { workspace = true }
5. Run: cargo check -p nie-core
6. Verify hpke 0.12.0 is in ~/.cargo/registry/src/ (already cached)

Defensive programming rules:
- Check for duplicate entries before adding (grep for hpke first)
- Use workspace = true pattern (already used for other deps in this project)
- Do not pin to exact patch version at workspace level
- cargo check must exit 0 before closing
acceptance_criteria: cargo check -p nie-core exits 0; cargo tree -p nie-core | grep hpke shows hpke v0.12
